title: New Dashboard
description:
The objective is to view a summary of the overall status based on the selected encoded date.
For example, when I filter the encoded date to 3rd February 2026, I should be able to see all shipments encoded on that date, along with a summary of their current overall status as of today.
Please explore this requirement and share any limitations or challenges you may encounter in developing this dashboard.
